system.description: When you **_order an ally to overcome fear, pain_**, doubt, or delusion, roll +CHA: **on a 10+**, they do it; **_on a 7-9_**, a PC gets advantage to do it; an NPC will do it, but they'll need time, they'll resent you, or they'll feel humiliated (GM decides).

partial.value: A PC gets advantage to do it; an NPC does it but at a cost (GM decides).
